description_long: This wardrobe features a modern, geometric design with a combination of natural wood and matte gray panels on the front. The left side of the front face includes three rectangular drawers with minimalist handles, while the right side is dominated by two large doors, each adorned with angular gray inlays that create a striking visual contrast. The handles are slim and vertically oriented, blending seamlessly with the overall aesthetic. The sides and top are finished in a consistent wood grain texture, while the back panel is a plain, light-colored surface. The wardrobe stands on a subtle base, slightly elevating it from the ground. Its overall construction suggests a sturdy, functional piece suitable for urban interiors or semi-public spaces.
description: A modern wardrobe with wood grain finish, gray geometric front panels, two large doors, and three drawers, featuring minimalist vertical handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large doors with gray geometric panels and three drawers with slim handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain wood grain surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, light-colored back panel with no decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying a plain wood grain surface similar to the left side.
